options.name: --chat
options.description:
Forces chat mode (continuous conversation) in cases where
the input would otherwise be written to console/stdout

options.name: --clear
options.description:
Clears the current profile and resets the config to default
values

options.name: --get-profile
options.description:
Shows the current profile settings saved in application
configuration

options.name: --get-template
options.description: Print a template in ps-gpt's template folder

options.name: --set-profile
options.description:
Sets a value in current profile. E.g. --set-profile
model=gpt-3

options.name: --set-template
options.description:
Set a template in ps-gpt's template folder to the content
specified in input text or pipeline.

options.name: --system-prompt
options.description:
Commands the api with a 'system' type message before
initializing the actual conversation

options.name: --template
options.description:
A file path pointing to a template file. Template file is
used as a wrapper for text content. '{text}' in templates is replaced with the
text prompt

arguments.name: text
arguments.description:
The text prompt sent to the specified model. Potentially 
preceded/surrounded by a prompt template if one has been defined.
